# Transworld Translation (Pvt) Ltd

Embassy-authorized certified translation company based in Pakistan, offering professional translation, interpreting, proofreading, and localization services between Urdu/English and foreign languages (Italian, Spanish, French, German, Arabic, Turkish, and more). Also offers language courses in Islamabad.

## Main pages

- Home: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/
- About: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/components/about
- Services: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/services
- Contact: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/components/contact
- Courses: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/all_courses
- Privacy Policy: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/privacy-policy

## Services

- Translation: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/services/translation
- Interpreting: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/services/interpreting
- Proofreading: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/services/proofreading
- Localization: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/services/localization

## Languages

- Italian: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/language/italian
- Spanish: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/language/spanish
- French: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/language/french
- German: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/language/german
- Arabic: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/language/arabic
- Turkish: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/language/turkish
- English: https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/language/english

## Courses

- Italian Language Course (ITL): https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/courses/ITL
- French Language Course (FR): https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/courses/FR
- English Language Course (ENG): https://www.transworldintl.com.pk/courses/ENG
